productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Black Sweater
description: Composition Black V-neck sleeveless sweater made of 100% cotton, has ribbed armholes, ribbing around the neck and hemline, and branding in appliqué on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron Flat dry in shade Welcome the winter in style in this pullover from US Polo. Stylish to the hilt and offering snug warmth, this sweater makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. Complement this stylish winter wear with denims and suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
